headline: Is United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is UPS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on United Parcel Service, Inc. on r/StockPickNews by EaseQuiet529. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on UPS. United Parcel Service, Inc.’s share was trading at $98.07 as of May 5th. UPS’s trailing and forward P/E were 15.58 and 13.46 respectively according […]
